guardrails.note: Read-only repair queue for human approval candidates. It turns repair-before-review decisions into task-level work without editing drafts.
guardrails.stopBefore: Do not run mark:review or publish from this queue. Use it to repair drafts, rerun automation, then ask for explicit human approval per file.

tasks.action: Verify source URLs and fact-check queries before mark:review.
tasks.proofRequired: Reviewer confirms final source URL is canonical or replaces it with an accessible equivalent.

tasks.action: Confirm no traffic, ranking, revenue, benchmark, cost, latency, or stability claim is unsupported.
tasks.proofRequired: Reviewer records source/fact-check confirmation and removes unsupported claims.

tasks.action: Resolve search weakness: no exact search query appears in title.
tasks.proofRequired: Primary query or accepted equivalent appears naturally in title, description, opening, and headings/body.

tasks.action: Apply or explicitly reject the internal-link suggestion before mark:review.
tasks.proofRequired: Draft contains at least one contextual link to a currently published relevant article.

tasks.action: Review reason: copydesk warning remediation exists.
tasks.proofRequired: Reviewer resolves or explicitly accepts copydesk warning without weakening guardrails.

tasks.action: Publishing remains a separate explicit approval step.
tasks.proofRequired: Draft remains status=draft, noindex=true, humanReviewRequired=true until explicit approval.
